title: Common UI Agent Failures
concept: Clicking off-screen elements, infinite page reloads, failing to wait for AJAX, and hitting CAPTCHAs.

exercises.prompt: What is one way to verify UI agents are operating safely?

options.text: Check if the browser is sandboxed
Check the color of the UI

exercises.explain: Checking if the browser is sandboxed helps to ensure the UI agent operates in a safe environment.

cards.title: Common UI Agent Failures
cards.body: UI agents can sometimes fail in surprising ways. Understanding these failures helps improve their performance.

cards.title: What are UI Agent Failures?
cards.body: UI agent failures are mistakes or issues that prevent the agents from interacting correctly with the web interface.

cards.title: Fixing a Tool
cards.body: Just like a tool might not work if you don't use it right, UI agents can fail if they don’t interact properly with elements on the screen.

cards.title: Real Examples
cards.body: A common failure is when an agent clicks on something that’s not visible because it’s off-screen.

cards.title: Myth: Agents are always perfect
cards.body: Some people think UI agents never make mistakes, but they can fail just like humans do!

cards.title: On-Screen vs Off-Screen Elements
cards.body: Not all elements are visible. Some may be just out of reach!

exercises.prompt: What is a common cause of infinite page reloads?

options.text: Not waiting for AJAX to finish

exercises.explain: Not waiting for AJAX to finish means the page might keep reloading while trying to fetch new data.

exercises.prompt: CAPTCHAs prevent UI agents from accessing web content.
exercises.explain: CAPTCHAs are designed to stop automated agents to ensure only human users can proceed.

exercises.prompt: When a UI agent doesn't wait for __________, it can cause issues.
exercises.sentence: When a UI agent doesn't wait for AJAX, it can cause issues.
exercises.explain: Waiting for AJAX is important for successful interactions without errors.

exercises.prompt: Which failure occurs when agents repeatedly reload the same page?
exercises.explain: Infinite page reloads happen when the page keeps refreshing without completing loading tasks.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following is NOT a common UI agent failure?
exercises.explain: Recognizing elements accurately is what we want agents to do, so it’s not a failure!
